failedAssertions.reason: Create User form validates correctly but POST /api/v1/admin/users returns HTTP 500 for all payloads — backend bug prevents user creation
Suspend button in row action dropdown non-functional — clicking it triggers row onClick (opens User Details) instead of suspend confirmation dialog. Event propagation bug in DataTable.
Force Reset Password button in row action dropdown non-functional — same event propagation bug as suspend. Clicking opens User Details instead of triggering reset action.

No company detail page exists — no /admin/companies/:id route. Only an Edit Company dialog with basic fields (name, code, email, phone, address, GST). No subscription, users count, or settings sections.
Changelog list is empty — no seed data entries exist in backend. Page shows correct empty state but assertion requires entries with version, date, content preview.
No WhatsNew indicator/banner found on hub or admin pages. May require actual changelog entries to trigger (none exist in system).
Page is a 'Send Notification' compose form, not a notifications inbox/list with timestamps, types, and read/unread status as expected by assertion.
Backend audit business-events endpoint returns HTTP 500 ('Failed to write request'). Frontend handles gracefully with error UI but cannot display events.
Runtime Metrics section shows 'Failed to load runtime metrics' error. No active tenants or resource usage displayed. Security Policy section renders correctly.
Page is an operational dashboard with KPIs (revenue, SLA, coverage), not a control panel with cache clear, job triggers, or health check controls as expected.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No users in test data have MFA enabled — all show 'No MFA' / 'Not enabled'. Cannot test Disable MFA functionality.
Create Role button not available for tenant admin. Page states role creation is managed by platform administrators (superadmin only). May be correct RBAC restriction.
No pending approval items in backend test data — all approval categories return empty arrays.
No pending approval items to test rejection. Additionally, reject dialog does NOT include reason input field (passes empty reason).

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: Browser — Admin Portal Assertions' section with isolation rules, concurrency guidance, and 5 assertion groupings for parallel execution

backendBugs: GET /api/v1/audit/business-events returns 500 (Internal Server Error: Failed to write request)
Tenant runtime metrics endpoint returns error or doesn't exist
frontendBugs: DataTable row action dropdown buttons (Suspend, Force Reset Password, Delete) non-functional — row onClick fires instead of button handler (event propagation bug)
Approvals page reject dialog does NOT include reason input field — passes empty reason string
uiMismatches: VAL-ADMIN-021: Notifications page is a compose form, not an inbox — assertion expects list view
VAL-ADMIN-029: Operations page is a KPI dashboard, not a control panel — assertion expects operational controls
VAL-ADMIN-012: No company detail route exists — only edit dialog with basic fields
VAL-ADMIN-028: Tenant Runtime shows only security policy, not tenant list with resource usage
dataGaps: No changelog entries seeded in backend
No MFA-enabled users in test data
No pending approval items in test data
